markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and refine the proposed content strategy and topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Refined:** The strategy now includes a "fan out" approach (Cluster 2) for trade-specific content and two new clusters for "Field Intelligence & AI" and "Industrial Construction."](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Calibration Article:** To ensure quality, the team will select a specific, mid-funnel topic (e.g., "plumbing contractor software") for the calibration article to test the AI's ability to produce deep, nuanced content.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [**Content OS Blocked:** The full Content OS (calendar) is on hold pending a broader team review of the strategy to prevent misalignments. Work can begin on approved clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [**AI Tracking:** GrowthX.ai will draft prompts for its "CheckThat" AI analytics platform to track brand mentions in LLMs. This must be set up next week to ensure data is available by the end of the 8-week sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Cluster Review

  - [William presented a revised content strategy with five clusters, incorporating team feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Cluster 1: Construction Plans & Drawing Management**](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Identified as the primary "entry point" for new users.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Plans and tasks are deeply interrelated.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
      - [**Action:** William will instruct the AI pipeline to integrate these topics in articles, even if they remain separate clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Cluster 2: Trade-Specific "Fan Out"**](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Create hyper-specific content for individual trades (e.g., "job management software for electrical contractors").](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [**Goal:** Capture long-tail search volume and build direct relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**New Cluster 6: Field Intelligence & AI**](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Prioritize "outcomes" keywords (e.g., "improve construction productivity") over pure AI terms.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Focus on user problems first, then introduce AI as the solution.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
      - [**Coordination Needed:** Check for overlap with the internal team's existing AI content (white paper, articles) to prevent keyword cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [**New Cluster 7: Industrial Construction**](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Low keyword difficulty (e.g., "data center construction" has 3k searches/mo at KD 8) presents a "greenfield" opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
      - [**Concern:** Search intent is unclear (software vs. construction company).](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
      - [**Decision:** Test the cluster with a clear ICP focus. It will not be a top priority for initial content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)

### Calibration Article & Content OS

  - [The team requested a specific, mid-funnel topic for the calibration article to test the AI's ability to produce deep, "meat and potatoes" content, moving beyond high-level overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [**Example Topic:** "plumbing contractor software that works in the field."](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [The full Content OS (calendar) is blocked until the broader team reviews the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** The team can approve 1-2 clusters for immediate work to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)

### AI Analytics Platform: CheckThat

  - [GrowthX.ai's "CheckThat" platform tracks brand mentions and sentiment in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai will draft prompts for review, covering broad terms ("best construction software") and trade-specific ones ("best plumbing construction management software").](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Setup must occur next week.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This ensures a full 8 weeks of data is collected for a complete performance view by the sprint's end.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
      - [Deliver the calibration article on the specific, mid-funnel topic by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
      - [Draft CheckThat AI tracking prompts for team review.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
      - [Instruct the AI pipeline to integrate "plans" and "tasks" concepts in relevant articles.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Antonia & Jess:**](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the calibration article.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
      - [Approve 1-2 content clusters to unblock initial work on the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
      - [Circulate the content strategy document to the broader team for review.](https://fathom.video/share/_88yoBqPfscTTsAsQfuezH6Fx1nKCMCm?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
